final:
// // This module controls the output voltage of an LDO regulator. When 'enable' is high, the output voltage is set to 0V, and when 'enable' is low, the output voltage is set to 5V.
module LDO_Regulator (
    input wire enable,
    output reg output_voltage
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (enable) begin
            output_voltage = 1'b1; // 5V represented as logic high
        end else begin
            output_voltage = 1'b0; // 0V represented as logic low
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module controls the output voltage of an LDO regulator. When 'enable' is high, the output voltage is set to 0V, and when 'enable' is low, the output voltage is set to 5V.
